<!--
Thanks for the PR! Quick checklist before you mark it Ready for Review.
Delete sections that don't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 lines: what changed and why. Not how — the diff already shows that. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / tooling

## Verification

<!-- How did you check this works? -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] For UI changes: tested manually in the browser
- [ ] For new instrumentation: added a route in the example apps that exercises it
- [ ] No new dependencies added to `@syskoio/core` (or, if added, explained below)

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #123 -->

## Anything else reviewers should know?

<!-- Surprising decisions, alternatives you rejected, open questions. -->
